# Feature Pull Request

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the feature being implemented.

## Related Issue
Closes #[ISSUE_NUMBER]  
(Replace with the issue number this PR addresses)

## PR Title Requirements
✅ Format: Follows `feat(scope): description` pattern  
✅ Type: Uses valid conventional commit type `feat`  
✅ Scope: Has valid scope (e.g., `messaging-view`)  
✅ Description: Has proper description after the colon  
✅ Length: Title is within the **10–100 character limit**

## Type of Change
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Enhancement (improvement to an existing feature)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Explain how you tested your changes and provide instructions so reviewers can replicate:
1. Test A
2. Test B

## Checklist
- [ ] I have linked the related issue
- [ ] I have verified the PR title follows conventional commit standards
- [ ] I have run the code locally and verified functionality
- [ ] I have added/updated documentation where needed
- [ ] I have added/updated tests if applicable
- [ ] All CI/CD checks pass successfully

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Insert screenshots, GIFs, or diagrams to help reviewers understand the feature.
